title: JoJo: Winds of Requiem
description: Brings JoJo's Bizarre Adventure into Minecraft!
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae2bfd417b54254c041eba80da5d7f0b2773eb52.png)

# Required Dependencies

[GeckoLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib/files/6304958)

[PlayerAnimator](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/playeranimator/files/6024462)

![Mod Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dabfd9c56e4ab3b39559a7b6bf867f97d57c2857_0.webp)

# Current Additions

This mod currently adds iconic abilities from JoJo's Bizarre Adventure, 
as well as a stat and leveling system for both stands AND players.

This mod aims to bring JJBA into Minecraft, with both a focus on survival
and combat with other players! Fight to increase your power,

or find items, such as Stand Arrows, to push yourself even further!

# Currently, the mod adds these abilities!
5 NEW Basic Abilities, available to all players, that are also compatible with stands!
- Star Platinum, with a total of 7 abilities!

- The World, with also a total of 7 abilities!

# Additional Links

[> Here you can join my Discord for updates and sneak peaks! <](https://discord.gg/CxkrnZQGzG)

[> Here is the official wiki for the mod! <](https://trello.com/b/TH5k2ogf/jojo-winds-of-requiem)

This mod is an active rework of the old "JoJo: World of Stands" and "JoJo: Hamon Era" mods!
